policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-13 - Deny lack of internal encryption of App Service Environments'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-13 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Environment Internal encryption
policyDefinition.description: This policy requires App Service Environments to use internal encryption. Setting InternalEncryption to true encrypts the pagefile, worker disks, and internal network traffic between the front ends and workers in an App Service Environment.

drcp.name: AppServiceEnvironmentInternalEncryption
drcp.controlDesc: Deny lack of internal encryption of App Service Environments

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
